notes: 2026 standard direct rate. Tax-inclusive for Villa La Percha; no separate guest tax line is added on DirectStay. Maintains roughly 20–23% book-direct savings versus updated Airbnb/VRBO comparison records for spring.
2026 summer peak direct rate. Ends Sep 8 after updated Airbnb/VRBO pricing showed the OTA shoulder stepdown beginning around Sep 8–12; keeps direct savings roughly in the 20–22% range during summer.

2026 shoulder-season direct rate. Added after updated Airbnb/VRBO pricing showed the prior $1,750 direct rate was only about a 15–16% savings in early/mid September. Tax-inclusive; no separate guest tax line is added on DirectStay.

2026 holiday ramp direct rate per Jaimal direction on 2026-05-07. More generous than OTA pricing but avoids leaving too much value on the table during the Dec 15–18 holiday ramp. Tax-inclusive; no separate guest tax line is added on DirectStay.

2026 Christmas/New Year direct rate per Jaimal direction on 2026-05-07. Intentionally more generous than Airbnb/VRBO peak holiday pricing while materially reducing the prior discount at $1,700/night. Tax-inclusive; no separate guest tax line is added on DirectStay.
